assertions.description: ReportingObserver is exposed; subscribers can observe a 'crash' report type filtered to the crash-reporting endpoint.
Report interface is exposed; crash reports surface as Report objects with type and body fields.
ReportingObserver can be instantiated with types: ['crash'] without throwing, which is how authors filter to crash-only.
ReportingObserver.prototype.takeRecords exists and lets consumers drain currently-buffered records (including crash reports).
ReportingObserver.prototype.observe is exposed; calling it activates the buffered crash report stream.
fetch() is available so the browser can post crash payloads to the Reporting-Endpoints-declared endpoint named 'crash-reporting'.
